perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with short hair and a checkered hat is seen indoors, holding a decorative ice cream cone and a wooden spoon. She looks at the camera, smiles, and takes a bite of a biscuit piece. (2) She continues to talk while holding the ice cream, looking down at it and then back at the camera. Her facial expressions are animated and cheerful as she explains something about the ice cream's structure or how to eat it. (3) She gestures with the wooden spoon, maintaining eye contact with the lens while the background remains a slightly blurred cafe or shop setting.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks in Mandarin with a playful and humorous tone. The background features upbeat, mid-tempo electronic BGM. Ambient noise includes the muffled chatter of a public space. (2) The vocal continues at a steady pace, explaining a concept. The BGM remains consistent in the background. (3) The vocal density remains high as she finishes her point, accompanied by the same upbeat background music and soft ambient cafe sounds.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "他其實..." Functional Text: Subtitle translating speech, neutral tone. (2) "他前世是...霜淇淋" Decorative Text: Variety-show style caption, humorous/playful tone. (3) "這樣講就不對了 完全不合邏輯..." Decorative Text: Emotional hook/caption, skeptical yet humorous tone. (4) "吃霜淇淋是不是應該留一點冰在裡面？不應該先把他挖完才吃對不對？" Functional Text: Full subtitles for narration, inquisitive tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The creator talks directly to the camera while holding and eating ice cream, moving from a joke to a practical tip.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator visible from the waist up.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female with a bob haircut wearing a beige and brown checkered hat, a light green tank top with a pink cat graphic, and multiple rings on her fingers. A Sony wireless microphone is clipped to her collar.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A brightly lit indoor space, likely a dessert shop or cafe, with white walls and some blurred signage or menus in the background.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright indoor lighting, possibly natural light from a window or studio-grade ceiling lights.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lighthearted food vlog where the creator shares a humorous observation about soft-serve ice cream and then poses a rhetorical question to the audience about the 'correct' way to eat it to maximize the experience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While a Sony microphone is visible, it is used as equipment rather than being the subject of promotion.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Close-up talking head style with direct address and humorous on-screen captions.
